name: Dispatcher
description: The orchestrator classifies intent and dispatches to the best-fit specialist agent. Each agent runs independently and returns results to the orchestrator for final composition. This is the default pattern for storefront sessions.
codeSnippet:
orchestrator = Agent(
  model=BedrockModel('claude-haiku-4-5'),
  tools=[search_agent, recommendation_agent,
         pricing_agent, inventory_agent,
         customer_support_agent],
  system_prompt=DISPATCHER_PROMPT
)

name: Agents-as-Tools
description: Each specialist agent is registered as a callable tool. The orchestrator invokes agents the same way it invokes any other tool, enabling dynamic composition and chaining of agent capabilities within a single turn.

name: Graph
description: Agents are nodes in a directed graph with explicit edges defining the flow. The orchestrator traverses the graph based on intent classification, enabling complex multi-step workflows with conditional branching and parallel execution.
